title: eleusine tristachya
intro: Eleusine tristachya, also known as blue panicgrass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and infusions, which are often consumed as teas or applied topically as poultices.
